title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・天雷轟くは

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross is out in front! She's running away with the lead! Aaand Tamamo Cross has crossed the finished line!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I did it... I went and won!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm... I'm da best in all Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Ngh... You were truly stunning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(So she is the most dazzling light of the moment...
And what a brilliantly bright light it is!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I shan't let this faze me, however. A part of me is
pleased, if anything!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(As to why... I expect it's because I've learned
there are still numerous racers out there who'll
push me to race with all I have.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I, too, must reach that world of
possibilities—where the light outshines even hers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have returned.
choice_data_list: Looks like you didn't come back empty-handed.
Looks like you didn't come back empty-handed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Although I'm frustrated that victory eluded
my grasp, I have learned something more
valuable.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...That their prowess is beyond anything I
imagined. As such, I'm truly delighted.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The existence of such exceptional,
boundary-pushing racers has shown me—as
clearly as the dawn light—that my limits do not lie
here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I can continue to be their dear rival
and goal to overcome...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The limits my body can overcome will remain
endless, and both the radiance I emit and the trail
of light I leave will shine on into eternity!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: That is what I believe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even when going up against superior opponents
head-on, Mejiro Ardan's resolve holds strong.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it looks like she's discovered just what
she's capable of, and it's set her fighting spirit
aflame!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I'll be able to reach those heights
someday? And emit a light more dazzling than
theirs?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hearing you say that with such confidence
is greatly encouraging.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her classic year draws to a close, I bet the
upcoming clashes against her rivals will become
even more intense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'd probably be best to give ourselves some time
to build up Mejiro Ardan's skills before running
another goal race.
choice_data_list: Next, let's set our sights on the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the traditional route? That race determines
the finest medium-distance runner of the spring,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...I imagine it'll be another gathering of brilliant
lights.
choice_data_list: You must be quite excited for that moment.
You must be quite excited for that moment.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's go back right away and review today's
events. I wish to look over Tamamo and Oguri's
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, an ecstatic Mejiro Ardan and I make our
way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, unbeknownst to us...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Tamamo Cross is out in front! She's running away with the lead! Annnd Tamamo Cross has crossed the finished line!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
These racers are so strong... and Ardan's keeping
up with them...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: While I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...It's okay. I can get stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No. I have to get stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...In order to become a worthy rival to Chiyono
O when she returns to the races someday!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai—there, I shall put on an even
more radiant performance!
